subject: Fermi  trigger No 740474239: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240619.30 (trigger No 740474239,06h 14m 24.00s , -76d 58m 58.8s, R=27.1) errorbox  45534 sec after notice time and 45568 sec after trigger time at 2024-06-19 19:56:42 UT, with upper limit up to  17.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 45 deg. The sun  altitude  is -53.1 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -29 deg., longitude l = 288 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2499525

We obtain a following upper limits.
